scripts.package: npm run build && mkdir -p releases && rm -f releases/nutritious-extension-1.0.0.zip && (cd dist && zip -r ../releases/nutritious-extension-1.0.0.zip .)
scripts.package:alpha: npm run build && mkdir -p releases && rm -f releases/nutritious-extension-0.1.0-alpha.zip && (cd dist && zip -r ../releases/nutritious-extension-0.1.0-alpha.zip .)
